focus: Deploy the approved GEN-024 milestone endpoint route bundle without changing the public/default accepted baseline behavior.
reason_started: The operator explicitly approved deployment after GEN-024 added local milestone search and explain endpoints.
reason_ended: The Cloudflare Worker deployment succeeded and public milestone/versioned endpoints were verified after propagation.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 45 Node tests, MDE parser, traceability validator, fixture index check, and fixture evaluation passed before deployment.

validators_executed.name: public endpoint verification
validators_executed.evidence: After propagation, /health and /api/v0.1/search returned 200; /api/milestones/arch-0.1/search returned 200; /api/milestones/arch-0.2-prf/explain returned 200; /api/milestones/arch-0.3-bge/search returned the intended 501.

validators_skipped.name: Remote BGE runtime query validation
validators_skipped.reason: The deployed BGE milestone endpoint intentionally returns milestone_runtime_not_enabled until runtime query-vector support exists.

evidence_quality_notes: A first public check saw one transient 404 for arch-0.1 during deployment propagation; repeated checks after propagation passed.
The public/default /api/search and /api/explain paths remain on the accepted ARCH-0.1 baseline.
The public BGE milestone reports its runtime limitation instead of faking vector search for arbitrary queries.
